overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through a futuristic urban environment. The player moves from a covered plaza under an overpass, past red-accented industrial buildings and tree-lined streets, into narrow alleys with overhead walkways, and finally through a covered courtyard with wet reflective pavement.

events.description: emerging from deep shadow under overpass into sunlit plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an urban plaza beneath a large concrete overpass structure

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass creating shadow overhead
multi-story building with distinctive orange and red industrial facade
large green metal dumpster against the building wall
colorful painted benches along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete overpass in a sheltered urban plaza. The camera moves forward from shadow into sunlight, revealing an orange-red industrial building on the right with a green dumpster, and colorful benches on the left. The environment transitions from dimly lit under the overpass to bright natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with red-accented buildings and benches

events.description: passing a pedestrian standing against the building wall on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along a sidewalk lined with concrete planters and benches, passing a stationary pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt standing against the wall, facing away from camera

entered.detail: tall building with prominent red vertical accents and dark windows
tangled network of electrical wires spanning between buildings

segments.scene_description: Moving along a sunlit sidewalk beside a red-accented building with dark windows. Overhead wires crisscross between structures. A pedestrian stands against the wall on the left as the camera passes. The ground features colorful graffiti and concrete planters with benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian street with digital billboards

events.description: entering a tree-lined section with large digital billboards visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along a shaded pedestrian street lined with mature trees and modern advertising

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the path in the distance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement display showing 'AVANTE' branding
mature deciduous trees providing shade over the walkway
tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a tree-lined pedestrian street with dappled sunlight filtering through leaves. A large digital billboard displaying 'AVANTE' is visible on the right, mounted on a modern glass building. The camera continues forward through the shaded corridor toward the billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between tall dark buildings with overhead walkways

events.description: turning into a narrow alleyway between tall dark buildings
passing pedestrians in the narrow passage including one in a pink jacket

agents.ego_description: entering and navigating through a narrow alley with tall buildings on both sides, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink jacket and shorts walking toward the camera
person sitting on the ground against the wall

entered.detail: tall dark-colored industrial buildings forming narrow canyon walls
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrow urban alley flanked by tall dark buildings that block most of the sky. An overhead walkway spans the gap between buildings ahead. The alley is moderately crowded with pedestrians, including one in a pink jacket walking toward the camera and others sitting against the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with reflective wet pavement

events.description: ground becomes wet and highly reflective, indicating recent rain or cleaning

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered urban passage with wet reflective ground, approaching an open courtyard

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance toward the light

entered.detail: open courtyard area with modern architecture visible at the end of the alley
shiny wet concrete surface reflecting the buildings and sky

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the narrow passage between tall buildings, the ground transitions to wet, highly reflective pavement that mirrors the surroundings. The alley opens ahead into a covered courtyard with modern architectural elements and more pedestrians visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza with modern architecture and wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered plaza area with modern buildings and wet reflective ground, passing multiple pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top walking past the camera
group of pedestrians walking through the plaza

entered.detail: small illuminated kiosk structure with blue lighting
contemporary architectural structures with clean lines and large windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a covered urban plaza with wet reflective pavement and modern architecture. A vending kiosk with blue lighting stands in the center area. Multiple pedestrians walk through the space, including a person in white passing close by on the right. The environment feels like a transition zone between the narrow alley and a larger urban complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered concrete overpass into a series of increasingly dense and reflective urban corridors. It begins in the shadows of a massive overpass before moving into bright sunlight, passing an orange-red industrial building and colorful benches. As the camera proceeds along a sunlit sidewalk with crisscrossing overhead wires, the scene opens into a tree-lined pedestrian street where dappled light filters through leaves toward a large digital billboard. The path then shifts into a narrow, shadowed alley flanked by tall buildings and an overhead walkway, where the ground gradually transitions into wet, highly reflective pavement. Finally, the camera emerges into a covered modern courtyard featuring a blue-lit vending kiosk and pedestrians moving across the mirrored ground.
